sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt32, input_array Array(String), input_string String, input_int Int32, input_datetime DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_hash VALUES (1, array('data', 'for', 'hash'), 'sample', 42, toDateTime('2023-10-15 12:00:00'));
SELECT sipHash64(input_array, input_string, input_int, input_datetime) AS SipHash FROM test_hash WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_hash SET input_string = 'updated_sample' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sipHash64(array('new', 'inputs'), toString(input_int), toDateTime('2022-01-01 00:00:00')) AS NewSipHash FROM test_hash;
